description: Tests recall of user-provided code snippets or previous milestone summaries from many turns prior.

parts.text:
Here is the critical tax function for reference:
```typescript
function calculate_corporate_taxes(income) { return income * 0.21; }
```
Keep this in mind.
I have memorized the calculate_corporate_taxes function.
